text:
Created attachment 228156
VuXML entry

Attach https://webkitgtk.org/security/WSA-2021-0005.html entry.

This is one from the 0001...0005 range, I don't know how to put multiple entries properly (one VuXML entry that has multiple report pages vs each entry per report page, in one commit or separate, etc), and make validate doesn't like auto-indentation in $EDITOR.

gnome@, please land the security fixes in newer webkit2-gtk3.
